free_text: Nuclear data relevant to the production of the
Several stacks each contained 4-6 sandwich samples
irradiated for 15 min at 10 - 100 nA beam.
Total error of the cross sections (typically
reactions) derived as the square root of the sum of
square of the individual errors, which are mainly
decay data errors (3% except for 85mY) and also
On. ERR-ANALYS: ERR-5 moved to free text.
SrCO3 was used as target material.
thin samples 6-16 mg/cm**2 were prepared by using
sedimentation onto 25 microns of Cu backing and
covered with 25 microns of Al foil. Each stack
contained at the front side a separate Cu monitor
was determined from the ratio of sigma(p,2n) and
sigma(p,n) on Cu-63 according to H. Piel et al.
